name: Elixir Cafe
description: Crafted for cafes, and food businesses. Features a stunning hero with parallax menu sections, online reservation form, chef spotlight, and a full gallery. Optimized for local SEO with schema markup for cafes.

name: Apex SaaS
tagline: Launch your SaaS product with confidence
description: A conversion-focused landing page for SaaS products and tech startups. Includes pricing tables, feature comparison grids, testimonials, FAQ accordion, and an integrated blog. Built with performance and SEO as top priorities.

name: Jewell Portfolio
description: A minimal, elegant portfolio template for designers, developers, and creative agencies. Features smooth page transitions, project case studies with detailed layouts, a filterable work grid, and a blog for thought leadership.

name: Medica Clinic
description: Designed for clinics, hospitals, and healthcare professionals. Features doctor profiles, appointment booking, service descriptions, patient testimonials, and health blog. HIPAA-friendly design patterns with accessibility in mind.
